# Search

![pub package](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@agent-smith/feat-search)

We search features

## Install

```bash
npm i -g @agent-smith/feat-search
```

Add the plugin and it's dependency to your `config.yml` file and run the `conf` command to update the cli.

```yml
plugins:
  - "@agent-smith/feat-search"
```

```bash
lm conf
```

Python packages required for web search:

```bash
pip install duckduckgo_search smolagents crawl4ai
```

## Actions and tools

## Search

Available search tools:

- <kbd>smsearch</kbd> search the web using Smollagents web search library
- <kbd>ddsearch</kbd> search the web using the Duckduckgo web search library
- <kbd>wikipedia</kbd> search Wikipedia using Smollagents

## Open web page

Available read page tools:

- <kbd>open_webpage</kbd> read a page using Smollagents
- <kbd>openpage</kbd> read a page using Crawl4ai

## Agents

Available agents with search tools:

- <kbd>searchweb</kbd> an agent with these tools:
    - smsearch
    - open_webpage
    - wikipedia
- <kbd>browse</kbd> an agent with the Playwright mcp server
- <kbd>infers</kbd> an agent with the `searchweb` subagent: can search in isolated context and return the results to the main agent
